# Judge

**Auth**: 6-character secret code (per round, generated by admin) → signed `rw_official_session` cookie
**Route prefix**: `/judge/events/[eventId]/...`
**Theme**: Dark

## What a judge does

A judge stands beside the racewalk course in an assigned zone and watches athletes for two technique faults: **bent knee** (`>`, `BENT_KNEE`) and **lifted foot** (`~`, `LIFTED_FOOT`). When they observe a fault, they issue a card.

## Per-judge limits

- **Yellow**: max 1 per symbol per athlete (so max 2 total — one bent-knee note, one lifted-foot note)
- **Red**: max 1 per athlete (any symbol; an overridden red frees a re-issue)

Yellow cards are immediate notes (no confirmation, never count toward DQ). Red cards are created `PENDING` and must be confirmed by a head judge. Aggregate across all judges, the 4th **confirmed** red on an athlete results in DQ. See [features/card-scoring](../features/card-scoring.md).

## Features used

| Feature | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| [secret-code-access](../features/secret-code-access.md) | Join via code → official cookie |
| [card-scoring](../features/card-scoring.md) | Issue yellow / red cards |

## Pages visited

- [Join](../pages/judge/join.md)
- [Workspace](../pages/judge/workspace.md)

## How it works

The join page validates the code via `joinAsOfficial` ([app/actions/officials.ts](../../app/actions/officials.ts)) — rate-limited to 10 attempts/IP/event/minute — and sets the `rw_official_session` cookie ([lib/official-session.ts](../../lib/official-session.ts)). The workspace ([components/judge/judge-workspace.tsx](../../components/judge/judge-workspace.tsx)) is a Server-Component read that auto-refreshes via `AutoRefresh` (`router.refresh()` every 2000ms while the round is SCHEDULED, 2500ms otherwise). Card buttons call `issueYellowCard` / `issueRedCard` in [app/actions/cards.ts](../../app/actions/cards.ts) (which require the `JUDGE` or `HEAD_JUDGE` position and an `ONGOING` round), then `router.refresh()`.

## Typical workflow

1. Receive code from admin (often on a printed slip).
2. Open `/judge/events/[eventId]/join`, enter the 6-char code.
3. On workspace, tap an athlete row → tap one of the four card buttons.
4. Buttons disable themselves when the per-judge limit is reached for that athlete (and when the athlete is finished or DQ).
5. Continue until the round ends; the workspace then becomes read-only history.
